set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: let generic code consume compatible dense, backend, and future sparse factors without erasing mathematical semantics.

Scope and acceptance:
- Define small separate capabilities for exact square solves and least-squares solves.
- Cover vector and matrix right-hand sides where the factorization supports them.
- Adapt LU, Cholesky, QR, and compatible backend-produced factor objects without changing factor diagnostics or ordering contracts.
- Keep exact solve, least squares, determinant, inverse, and orthogonal-factor operations distinct.
- Return typed failures and preserve existing ergonomic concrete methods.
- Add compile-time/API tests plus numerical laws across all implementors.
set.title: Define common exact-solve and least-squares factorization capabilities
